templates.name: Trucktok 默认模板
templates.content:
Dear Partner,

I'm Jade, manager of the Trucktok Affiliate Program (ID: 44072).

TruckTok is a trusted brand specializing in high-demand diesel delete kits and all-in-one intake & exhaust systems for Ford Powerstroke, GM Duramax, and RAM Cummins.

As a specialized leader in the diesel performance market, our strong brand recognition translates directly into high conversion rates—and significant earning potential for you.

We offer:
- Up to 15% commission on all sales
- High-performing creatives and full support
- Strong conversion rates backed by consumer trust
Our website: https://www.trucktok.com/

We believe this is a powerful opportunity and would love for you to join us!

Best, 
Trucktok Affiliate Team

templates.name: zapaka
templates.content:
Join Zapaka’s Affiliate Program – Earn Up to 15% Commission on Every Glamorous Sale
Dear Partner,
I’m Fay, Affiliate Manager for Zapaka (https://zapaka.com/). Zapaka is a fast-growing global eveningwear brand known for its elegant, red-carpet-ready gowns and chic formal dresses that empower women to shine at every special occasion—from galas and weddings to proms and milestone celebrations.
We’re excited to invite you to join our affiliate program.
✨ Here’s why Zapaka is a perfect addition to your portfolio:
- Attractive Commission: Up to 15% commission with reliable tracking and timely payouts.
- High Demand & High AOV: Our customers invest in premium looks—average order value typically exceeds $200
- Trending Collections: Bestselling categories include proms, weddings, mother of the bride, and bridesmaid that convert exceptionally well
- Full Creative Support: Access to high-res imagery, seasonal banners, exclusive promo codes, and dedicated campaign assets tailored for fashion, lifestyle, and event-focused audiences

We’d be thrilled to welcome you to the Zapaka family and support your success from day one. Can we get you onboard this week?

Warm regards,
Fay
Affiliate Manager – Zapaka
https://zapaka.com/
